_README: Per-test field masks for golden comparison. Combined with the rule engine
in tests/golden_masks.py at compare time; the golden captures are never
modified. Use this file only for one-off undefined-output cases that the
general rules do not cover -- most undefined behaviour (e.g. DIV overflow)
is handled by a rule and needs no entry here.
"reason": "why these fields are undefined (cite the manual)"
Field names match compare_golden output: R<n>, flag_<C|Z|S|V|DA|H>,
